Backstory (source: https://xenophanes.fandom.com/wiki/Lord_X#WHITE_RABBIT)

This story begins with a young girl named Alice who lives with her father. Her father would often come out to play with her, but one day, he didn’t appear. Days turned into weeks, and Alice grew increasingly worried. It wasn’t until she encountered a white rabbit that she learned the reason for his absence. The rabbit revealed that Alice's father had lost something very important, and she needed to find it and return it to him. Confused, Alice asked the rabbit where to go, and he urged her to follow him. She followed the rabbit into Wonderland, determined to discover what her father had lost. As they explore, it became harder for Alice to keep up with the rabbit until, eventually, he lost her, leaving her alone. Suddenly, Alice transformed into a rabbit, resembling the white rabbit. The item her father had lost was, in fact, his own daughter. The video end with a crumpled piece of paper, and suddenly, X's pupils appear, with the left pupil leaking a dark substance.

While the context of this video is limited, it is heavily implied that X has taken Alice's soul to his pocket dimension, resulting in her transformation into what is known as a Cream vessel, hence her becoming a rabbit at the end. She was then sacrificed to X, being taken away into his world to a part that he called "wonderland".

Appearance:

Human form: She has a blonde hair, white shir, red skirt and black shoes.

Vessel form: Alice takes the form of Cream the Rabbit from the Sonic the Hedgehog series. She is a small and cream-furred anthropomorphic rabbit with cinnamon-brown eyes, a small brown nose, and a white muzzle. She has princeton orange markings around her eyes, on her head and at the tips of her long ears. She also has one long eyelash on each eye and a short and fluffy tail that sticks out of her dress, though it is not always visible. For attire, she wears a simple sleeveless vermilion dress with a white collar and a light blue cravat, white gloves with a gold cufflink on each cuff, white socks and vermilion and yellow slip-on shoes with gray soles. Her ears also have pink-colored canals and are usually swiveled back and flop behind her head.

Alt form (if killed by X): Her fur will be purple and her princeton orange markings are red. Her left eye is also sealed shut, and blood pours out from it.
creator: ManuelSonicLover
